site.name: BRICKS CONSTRUCTIONS
site.heroSubtitle: Chennai's trusted construction partner for homes, commercial buildings and renovations. Quality workmanship, honest pricing, on-time delivery.

about.heading: About Bricks Constructions
about.text: Bricks Constructions is a Chennai-based construction company serving Madambakkam and surrounding areas. From independent houses and apartments to commercial spaces and renovations, we handle every project with the same commitment — strong foundations, quality materials and transparent pricing. Our experienced team turns your plans into reality, on time and on budget.

services.title: Residential Construction
services.description: Independent houses, villas and apartments built from the ground up with quality materials and skilled workmanship.

services.title: Commercial Construction
services.description: Shops, offices and commercial complexes designed and built for your business needs.

services.title: Renovation & Remodeling
services.description: Complete makeovers for old buildings — structural repairs, extensions and modernisation.

services.title: Interior Works
services.description: False ceilings, modular kitchens, wardrobes, painting and complete interior finishing.

services.title: Planning & Approvals
services.description: Building plans, elevation designs and assistance with government approvals.

services.title: Project Supervision
services.description: End-to-end supervision of your project with regular updates and transparent billing.

projects.title: Mixed-Use Building, Madambakkam
projects.description: G+2 building — ground-floor shops with residences above.

projects.title: Villa Renovation
projects.description: Complete renovation and modern interior finishing.

testimonials.name: Suresh Kumar
testimonials.text: Bricks Constructions built our house exactly as promised — on time and within budget. Very honest team.

testimonials.name: Priya Raman
testimonials.text: Excellent renovation work. They handled everything from planning to finishing. Highly recommended.

testimonials.name: Mohammed Farook
testimonials.text: Professional and transparent. Regular updates throughout the project. Quality of work is top class.
